problem_statement: Manufacturing Batches, QC, and Maintenance. A factory operations analyst needs to connect maintenance timing to quality, runtime, and energy efficiency.
question: For batches produced strictly within 7 days after any maintenance event (repair or inspection) on the same machine, compute energy consumed per good unit produced. Calculate the per-line median of this metric, rounded to 2 decimal places. Which production line has the worst (highest) median post-maintenance energy per good unit?
agent_instructions: The data source is a directory of CSV files. Inspect only the files needed for the question and compute the answer directly in notebook code.
